name: teach
title: Teach
description: Use this skill when the user asks the OS agent to teach them a daily deep idea, create an AI-seeded learning guide, ingest a research source for teaching, or publish a durable Sites guide that explains one transferable concept. It coordinates research ingest, typed guide rendering, Sites publishing, and optional teach state updates.
trigger: Invoke when the user asks to teach, learn one idea, run Daily Deep Idea, create an AI learning guide, explain a paper/source as a durable lesson, or set up/swap an auto-teaching topic queue.
